title: M.A Jobs 2026 – Project Manager, Counsellor and More
org: Project Manager, Counselor, District Resource Person
shortInfo: Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 notification released for Project Manager, Counsellor , District Resource Person posts. Eligible candidates can apply offline before 06 June 2026 through the official Pudukkottai District website.

basic_details.job_title: Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Manager, Counsellor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Project Manager, Counselor, District Resource Person
basic_details.short_information: Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 notification released for Project Manager, Counsellor , District Resource Person posts. Eligible candidates can apply offline before 06 June 2026 through the official Pudukkottai District website.

qualification.details: Project Manager, Counselor: MSW., MA., (Sociology), MSc., (Psychology) - Regular District Resource Person (Counselor): MSW, Regular

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06 June 2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

click_here.text: Official Notification PDF- District Resource Person

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026 is 06 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this date.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Manager (PM) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSW, MA in Sociology, or MSc in Psychology (Regular) to be eligible for the Project Manager (PM) position.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary offered for both Project Manager (PM) and Project Counselor (Counselor) posts ranges from Rs. 16,000 to Rs. 21,000 per month.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for Pudukkottai District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Pudukkottai District administration in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxation details. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature, meaning they are offered on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
